description: A digest summarising the most impactful work shipped over an arbitrary period (a month, quarter, year, or any ad-hoc span).

main.description: A summary of the most impactful contributions shipped during a period.

title.description: Free-form label for the period, e.g. 'March 2026', 'Q2 2026', '2026 in review'. Derived from the range when omitted.

startDate.description: Start of the period covered by this digest.

endDate.description: End of the period covered by this digest.

summary.description: Prose summary of the period's most impactful work (Markdown).

highlights.description: References to the featured es.joeinn.shipped records for this period.
